stimulus_metadata.title: Community garden summary
stimulus_metadata.passage: A neighborhood group moved a small community garden from a shaded lot to a brighter riverside space. Volunteers reported that the new location helped seedlings grow more evenly, but it also required extra weekend watering because the soil dried faster.
stimulus_metadata.question: Summarize the trade-off described in two or three sentences.

answer.response_text: The move gives the garden more light, so seedlings grow more evenly. The trade-off is that the riverside soil dries faster and volunteers need to water more often.

stimulus_metadata.title: Library hours reasoning
stimulus_metadata.passage: A library tested opening one hour earlier on weekdays. Morning visits increased among parents after school drop-off, while late-afternoon visits stayed about the same. Staff said the change was useful only if morning volunteers were available.
stimulus_metadata.question: Explain whether the earlier opening seems useful and what condition matters most.

answer.response_text: The move gives the garden more light, so seedlings grow more evenly. The trade-off is that the riverside soil dries faster and volunteers need to water more often.

stimulus_metadata.title: Bike rack decision
stimulus_metadata.passage: A campus survey found that students wanted more bike racks near the science building, but maintenance staff warned that the narrow walkway already became crowded during class changes. The planning team considered racks near a wider side entrance instead.
stimulus_metadata.question: Describe the planning team's dilemma and the compromise under consideration.

answer.response_text: The move gives the garden more light, so seedlings grow more evenly. The trade-off is that the riverside soil dries faster and volunteers need to water more often.

stimulus_metadata.title: Attention check
stimulus_metadata.passage: This is an attention check. To show that you are reading the instructions, type the word blue in the response box.
stimulus_metadata.question: What word were you asked to type?

answer.response_text: blue
